records.ety: [F. chicore, earlier also cichore, L. cichorium, fr. Gr. <?/, <?/, Cf. Succory.]

defs: A branching perennial plant (Cichorium Intybus) with bright blue flowers, growing wild in Europe, Asia, and America; also cultivated for its roots and as a salad plant; succory; wild endive. See Endive.
The root, which is roasted for mixing with coffee.
